brands.name: Samsung
brands.description: Samsung is a leading global electronics brand offering smartphones, TVs, tablets, wearables, home appliances, and more.

brands.name: LG
brands.description: LG specializes in consumer electronics including televisions, home audio, monitors, and household appliances.

brands.name: Apple
brands.description: Apple designs premium consumer electronics such as iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and related accessories.

brands.name: Dell
brands.description: Dell produces laptops, desktops, monitors, and business-focused computing solutions.

brands.name: HP
brands.description: HP offers a wide range of laptops, desktops, printers, and accessories for home and business use.

brands.name: Garmin
brands.description: Garmin specializes in GPS-enabled devices, including smartwatches, fitness trackers, and navigation systems.

brands.name: Fitbit
brands.description: Fitbit creates fitness trackers and smartwatches focused on health metrics and activity tracking.

brands.name: Sony
brands.description: Sony produces televisions, audio equipment, cameras, gaming consoles, and other consumer electronics.

brands.name: Lenovo
brands.description: Lenovo offers laptops, desktops, tablets, and accessories for consumers and enterprises.

brands.name: ASUS
brands.description: ASUS manufactures laptops, gaming PCs, monitors, routers, and computer components.

brands.name: Acer
brands.description: Acer is known for value-focused laptops, monitors, desktops, and gaming systems.

brands.name: TP-Link
brands.description: TP-Link produces networking equipment including Wi-Fi routers, mesh systems, and smart home devices.

brands.name: Netgear
brands.description: Netgear offers home and business networking products such as Wi-Fi routers, extenders, and switches.

brands.name: Bose
brands.description: Bose specializes in premium audio including headphones, portable speakers, and home sound systems.

brands.name: JBL
brands.description: JBL is known for portable Bluetooth speakers, headphones, and home audio products.

products.name: Samsung 55" Q60C QLED 4K Smart TV
products.short_description: 55-inch 4K QLED smart TV with HDR and Wi‑Fi.
products.long_description: The Samsung 55" Q60C QLED 4K Smart TV delivers vibrant colors, sharp detail, and smooth motion in a slim design. Features built-in Wi‑Fi, popular streaming apps, and multiple HDMI ports for your devices.

products.name: LG 55" UP8000 4K UHD Smart TV
products.short_description: 55-inch 4K UHD smart TV with webOS and HDR10.
products.long_description: The LG 55" UP8000 4K UHD Smart TV offers crisp 4K visuals, HDR10 support, and LG's intuitive webOS smart platform. Ideal for movies, sports, and gaming with multiple HDMI and USB inputs.

products.name: Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.short_description: Lightweight wireless over-ear headphones with Bluetooth 5.0 and active noise cancelling.
products.long_description: The Sony WH-CH720N wireless headphones feature Bluetooth 5.0, active noise cancelling, and up to 35 hours of battery life. Comfortable earcups and lightweight design make them ideal for commuting and office use.

products.name: JBL Tune 760BTNC Wireless Headphones
products.short_description: Over-ear wireless headphones with Bluetooth 5.0 and active noise cancelling.
products.long_description: The JBL Tune 760BTNC delivers JBL Pure Bass sound with wireless Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity and active noise cancelling. Foldable design and up to 35 hours of playtime make them great for travel.

products.name: Dell Inspiron 15 15.6" Laptop - 16GB RAM 512GB SSD
products.short_description: 15.6-inch Windows laptop with Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, and 512GB SSD.
products.long_description: The Dell Inspiron 15 is a versatile 15.6-inch laptop featuring an Intel Core i7 processor, 16GB of DDR4 RAM, and a fast 512GB SSD. Ideal for productivity, entertainment, and light creative work.

products.name: HP Pavilion 14" Laptop - 16GB RAM 1TB SSD
products.short_description: 14-inch lightweight laptop with 16GB RAM and 1TB SSD, featured in laptop deals.
products.long_description: The HP Pavilion 14 is a slim and portable laptop with an Intel Core i5 processor, 16GB RAM, and a spacious 1TB SSD. Great for students and professionals who need both speed and storage. Featured as a limited-time laptop deal.

products.name: Acer KA242Y 24" Full HD Monitor
products.short_description: 24-inch 1080p monitor with slim bezels, featured in monitor deals.
products.long_description: The Acer KA242Y is a 24-inch Full HD (1920x1080) monitor with a slim bezel design, 75Hz refresh rate, and AMD FreeSync support. Ideal for home office and casual gaming, and currently featured in the monitor deals section.

products.name: Apple iPad 10.9" (10th Generation, Wi‑Fi, 64GB)
products.short_description: 10.9-inch iPad with A14 Bionic chip and 64GB storage.
products.long_description: The 10th generation iPad features a 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, A14 Bionic chip, and 64GB of storage. Perfect for streaming, browsing, note-taking, and light creative work.

products.name: Apple iPad Air 11" (5th Generation, Wi‑Fi, 256GB)
products.short_description: 11-inch iPad Air with M1 chip and 256GB storage.
products.long_description: The iPad Air 11-inch (5th gen) features the Apple M1 chip, a stunning Liquid Retina display, and 256GB of storage. Ideal for creative professionals and power users who need portability and performance.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G (128GB)
products.short_description: Mid-range Samsung Android smartphone with 5G and 6.6" display.
products.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy A55 5G offers a 6.6-inch Super AMOLED display, 5G connectivity, 128GB of storage, and a versatile triple camera system. A great mid-range choice with strong battery life and fast charging.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G Clear Protective Case
products.short_description: Slim clear TPU case for Samsung Galaxy A55 5G.
products.long_description: This clear TPU case is designed specifically for the Samsung Galaxy A55 5G, offering scratch and drop protection while keeping the phone’s original design visible. Raised edges help protect the screen and camera.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A55 5G Tempered Glass Screen Protector (2-Pack)
products.short_description: 2-pack tempered glass screen protector for Samsung Galaxy A55 5G.
products.long_description: This 2-pack tempered glass screen protector is engineered for the Samsung Galaxy A55 5G, offering edge-to-edge protection with 9H hardness and an oleophobic coating to resist fingerprints and smudges.

products.name: JBL Flip 6 Waterproof Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.short_description: Rugged waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with powerful sound.
products.long_description: The JBL Flip 6 is a compact waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with powerful bass and up to 12 hours of playtime. IP67 dustproof and waterproof rating makes it ideal for poolside, beach, and outdoor adventures.

products.name: Bose SoundLink Flex Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker
products.short_description: Premium waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with rich sound.
products.long_description: The Bose SoundLink Flex is a rugged, waterproof Bluetooth speaker that delivers deep, clear sound in a compact design. With IP67 rating and up to 12 hours of battery life, it’s perfect for outdoor listening.

products.name: Garmin Forerunner 265 GPS Running Smartwatch
products.short_description: Garmin GPS running watch with AMOLED display and up to 13 days battery life.
products.long_description: The Garmin Forerunner 265 is a premium GPS running smartwatch with a vibrant AMOLED display, advanced training metrics, heart rate monitoring, and up to 13 days of battery life in smartwatch mode.

products.name: Fitbit Versa 4 Fitness Smartwatch
products.short_description: Fitbit smartwatch with built-in GPS, heart rate, and 6+ days battery life.
products.long_description: The Fitbit Versa 4 offers built-in GPS, 24/7 heart rate tracking, sleep monitoring, and up to 6 days of battery life. It’s a versatile fitness-focused smartwatch with smartphone notifications and workout tracking.

products.name: TP-Link Archer AX55 Wi‑Fi 6 Router
products.short_description: Dual-band Wi‑Fi 6 router with up to 2.4 Gbps combined speed.
products.long_description: The TP-Link Archer AX55 is a dual-band Wi‑Fi 6 router delivering fast and reliable wireless performance for busy households. Features OFDMA, MU-MIMO, and advanced security via TP-Link HomeShield.

products.name: Netgear Nighthawk AX4 Wi‑Fi 6 Router
products.short_description: Wi‑Fi 6 router with dual-band AX speeds and Nighthawk app control.
products.long_description: The Netgear Nighthawk AX4 provides reliable Wi‑Fi 6 performance for medium-sized homes, with dual-band speeds, OFDMA, and Beamforming+ technology. Easily manage your network using the Nighthawk mobile app.

products.name: ASUS RT-AX58U Wi‑Fi 6 Router
products.short_description: AX3000 dual-band Wi‑Fi 6 router with AiMesh support.
products.long_description: The ASUS RT-AX58U is an AX3000 dual-band Wi‑Fi 6 router with OFDMA and MU-MIMO for efficient network performance. Supports AiMesh for easy whole-home mesh networking and includes advanced parental controls.
